amendments.reason: The v1.5 golden cohort is retired after the collector failed closed before producing a collection record; the v1.5 untouched cohort remains unexecuted and is conservatively withdrawn. The v1.6 exact historical exclusion ledger is committed before fresh metadata-only selection. No v1.6 source, labels, detector code, or detector output were consulted.

The public discovery contract locks a detector-independent collector that ignores non-regular Git symlinks without traversing them, plus file eligibility rules, recipe patterns, deterministic IDs, explicit zero-hit rows, and output hashes before any v1.6 cohort source access.
Fresh disjoint v1.6 cohorts will be selected from two new context-isolated GitHub metadata-only proposals after excluding the exact reset ledger. Release thresholds and detector rules do not change.
